videos.title: HTML Colspan and Rowspan - Merge Table Cells
videos.description: Clear explanation of how to use colspan and rowspan attributes to merge cells in HTML tables.

videos.title: HTML Tables: Colspan and Rowspan Explained
videos.description: Kevin Powell demonstrates colspan and rowspan with practical examples and common pitfalls.

videos.title: Complex HTML Tables with Colspan and Rowspan
videos.description: Brad Traversy builds complex table layouts using colspan, rowspan, and CSS styling.

videos.title: HTML Table Accessibility - Scope and Headers
videos.description: Tutorial on making complex tables accessible with scope, id, and headers attributes.
